name: Oatmeal & Dried Cranberry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Stir in oats and cranberries.
4. Shape dough into 2-inch balls and place on greased baking sheets.
5. Flatten the cookies slightly.
6. Bake at 325°F for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks.
